Puddy's Last Stand
🍺   Stag Weekend   ✈️   Munich, Germany   🍺
PUDDY
is getting married — god help us all
🍺

Luke Puddy — a man of many qualities, most of which we've chosen to overlook for the purposes of this weekend. He's found a woman somehow willing to take his name, and we intend to send him off to married life in the only way we know how: with steins, schnitzel, and absolutely no regrets.

Munich, 12–14 June. Nineteen of his finest (and we use that term loosely) are heading to Bavaria to give Puddy the send-off he deserves — and, if we're honest, the send-off we all need. Prost.

"They say hair is a man's crowning glory. In Puddy's case, the crown has been steadily annexed since roughly 2019 — and the hairline shows no signs of negotiating a peace deal."
— A concerned observer (with a full head of hair)
"Puddy has spent years throwing himself down roads at 150mph on a motorbike and walked away without a scratch. He gets engaged and somehow ends up in a sling. Make of that what you will."
— The Lads (drawing their own conclusions)
"A wise man once said nothing — because his fiancée was in the room. Luke Puddy is that wise man now. We'll miss who he was."
— Munich, June 2025
Fri 12 June
Munich
Sun 14 June
The Plan (Loosely)

Weekend Itinerary

Munich, 12–14 June 2025 · 19 legends, 1 stag

12 June
Friday
VibeArrive, explore, eat, drink, descend into Bavarian chaos
06:55 BST
Depart London Heathrow
Travel
LH2483 takes off from Terminal 2. Get there at least 2 hours early — T2 security can bite.
⏰ Recommended arrival: 05:00 · Gate A18 (check day-of)
09:45 CEST
Land at Munich Airport (MUC)
Travel
Welcome to Bavaria. S8 recommended. Journey ~45–55 mins to the hotel.
🚆 See Getting To The City tab · Munich is 1hr ahead of London
11:00 – 11:30
Drop Bags at Hotel Europa
Hotel
Rooms not ready until 15:00 — dump bags in storage and get out there.
🏨 Dachauer Str. 115, 80636 München
~11:30
Beers, Lunch & Explore Munich
Drinks
Marienplatz, old town, Weisswurst and a pretzel on the go. First taste of Munich.
Afternoon
Hirschgarten — World's Largest Beer Garden
Must Do
8,000 seats under ancient chestnut trees, founded 1791. Augustiner from multiple taps. Even a deer enclosure — if anyone looks up from their stein.
🦌 S-Bahn: Hirschgarten or Laim station
15:00
Hotel Check-In & Get Ready
Hotel
Back to the Europa to check in, shower, and resurrect. Good luck, Puddy.
16:00
Head Out — Find a Bar
Drinks
Pre-dinner drinks. Maxvorstadt, the old town — wherever the mood takes you.
18:30
Dinner @ HeimWerk Tal
Dinner
Munich's schnitzel specialist — golden, pan-fried perfection, Augustiner on tap, hearty Bavarian sides.
📍 Tal 15, 80331 München · Booked ✓
21:00
Hofbräuhaus — The Legendary Beerhouse
Highlight
Founded 1589. Brass band, a litre of Hofbräu, a thousand strangers, and 18 increasingly unhinged friends.
📍 Platzl 9, 80331 München · Open until midnight · Live band every night
Late
Beers & Debauchery
Evening
The night is long. The beer is cold. Puddy's freedom is finite. Act accordingly.
13 June
Saturday
VibeSlow start, supercars, scooters, Bavarian beer hall feast
Easy Start
Breakfast, Coffee, Wake Up
Morning
No alarms. Proper German breakfast — bread, cold cuts, cheese, strong coffee.
10:40
Uber to Motorworld (20 min)
Travel
4–5 cars needed. Alt: U6 to Freimann + 10 min walk.
11:00 – 13:00
Motorworld Munich — Supercar Heaven
Activity
75,000m² automotive wonderland. Free entry. 30+ brands. Spot Elvis's BMW 507 and Paul Walker's R34 Skyline.
🏎️ Werner-Heisenberg-Allee 5 · Free · 07:30–22:00
13:00
Lunch at Motorworld
Lunch
Multiple restaurants on site. Fuel up before heading back.
15:00 – 15:30
Back to Hotel · Shower & Go
Hotel
Ubers or U6 back. 45 minutes to turnaround.
16:15
Explore Munich by Voi Scooter
Activity
Electric scooters through Munich's streets. See the Voi Scooters tab for the full prep guide.
📱 Download Voi before you leave home
19:30
Dinner @ Augustiner-Keller
Dinner
Beer tapped from wooden barrels, vast chestnut-tree beer garden, Schweinshaxe and duck. More authentic than Hofbräuhaus.
📍 Arnulfstr. 52, Maxvorstadt · Booked ✓
21:00 onwards
Evening Debauchery
Evening
Night two. You've had one to find your feet — now make the most of it.
14 June
Sunday
VibeGentle morning, escape room chaos, then home
Easy Start
Breakfast, Coffee, Wake Up
Morning
Last morning. Coffee, pastries, possibly aspirin.
By 12:00
Check-Out & Bag Store
Hotel
Check out by noon and put bags into storage.
10:30 → 11:00
Escape Game Munich
Activity
Three rooms, three teams, 60 minutes. See the Escape Room tab for team assignments.
🔐 Ehrenbreitsteiner Str. 36 · Booked ✓ · Arrive 15 min early
12:30
Lunch on the Go
Lunch
Viktualienmarkt — pretzels, Bratwurst, last feed in Munich.
14:00
Leave City for Airport
Travel
Pick up bags, then head to MUC. Allow 45–55 min.
🚆 S8 from Hauptbahnhof or LH Express Bus
15:15
Arrive Munich Airport
Travel
Check-in opens ~2hrs before. Terminal 2, Lufthansa.
17:20 CEST
Fly Back — LH2486
Travel
One last airport beer — practically mandatory.
18:25 BST
Arrive Heathrow — LHR T2
Home
Back on British soil. Puddy is no longer a free man. Mission accomplished.

Munich Airport → Europa Hotel

Getting To The City

Your options from MUC to the hotel

🚆
S-Bahn Recommended
S8 or S1 from airport to Hauptbahnhof. Tram 20/21 (Moosach/Westfriedhof) to Sandstraße — 2 min walk to hotel.
MUC → S8/S1 → Hauptbahnhof → Tram 20/21 → Sandstraße → 2 min walk
€11–16
per person
~49 min
🚌
Lufthansa Express Bus
Direct to München Hbf every 15 min. Free Wi-Fi. Blue LH Bus signs in all terminals. Then Tram 20/21 to Sandstraße.
MUC → LH Bus → München Hbf → Tram 20/21 → Sandstraße → 2 min walk
€12–16
per person
~56 min
🚕
Taxi / Private Transfer
Door-to-door. Sedan ~€75–80 (up to 4 pax). Pre-booked minivan ~€115 (up to 7 pax).
MUC → Taxi rank → Hotel Europa direct
€75–115
per vehicle
~25 min
🚗
Uber
Works well in Munich. Expect ~€50–80 depending on surge. Book ahead — demand spikes at the 09:45 arrival.
App → MUC pickup → Hotel Europa direct
€50–80
per vehicle
~25–35 min
Route Map
Munich Airport → Europa Hotel
Munich Airport
Hotel Europa
~49 min by transit

Saturday Afternoon

Voi Scooters

Everything you need to do before you arrive

🛴 Electric Scooters — Munich Style
Saturday at 16:15 we're hitting Munich's streets on Voi e-scooters. Do the prep below before leaving home and you'll be rolling in seconds.
Before You Leave Home — Do This
01
Download the Voi App
Free on App Store and Google Play. Do it now so you're not fumbling in the street with 18 people watching.
🍎
Download on theApp Store
▶
Get it onGoogle Play
02
Create Your Account
Sign up with email and phone number. Voi sends a verification code — do this on home WiFi, not Munich roaming.
03
Add a Payment Method
Link a credit/debit card, Apple Pay or Google Pay. No payment method = no scooter.
04
Enable Location Services
Settings → Voi → Location → Allow While Using App. Needed to show nearby scooters and unlock them.
05
First-Timers: Complete the RideSafe Module
Under Profile → RideSafe Academy. Short, earns you a free ride credit, and means you won't wobble into a German cyclist.
Approximate Pricing
Unlock fee~€1.00
Per minute riding~€0.25–0.35 / min
Typical 20 min ride~€5–8
Voi Pass (unlimited unlocks)Available in-app
How to Ride — On the Day
→
Find a scooter on the map
Open Voi, tap a nearby scooter. Green battery = plenty of charge.
→
Scan the QR code on the handlebar
Tap Unlock, point camera at QR — it beeps and ride starts.
→
Ride, explore, repeat
Throttle right, brake left. Kick off gently before applying throttle. Max 20 km/h.
→
End your ride properly
Park upright using kickstand. Tap End Ride, photo the parked scooter.
✓   Do
Ride in cycle lanes and bike paths
Use hand signals when turning
Park upright using the kickstand
One person per scooter
Wear a helmet if you have one
✗   Don't
Ride on pavements
Two people on one scooter
Ride drunk (0.5‰ BAC limit)
Block pedestrian paths when parking
Hang bags on the handlebars
⚠️ Drink-riding is treated like drink-driving in Germany. Legal limit is 0.5‰ BAC. Voi's T&Cs apply a stricter 0‰. There's still all of Saturday evening ahead — ride sensibly.
Sunday Morning · 11:00

Escape Room

19 men. 3 rooms. 60 minutes. Zero excuses.

EscapeGame Munich — Ehrenbreitsteiner Str.
Ehrenbreitsteiner Str. 36, 80993 München
Tel: +49 89 716 98 773 · info@escapegame-munich.de
U-Bahn: U1 to Olympia-Einkaufszentrum (OEZ) + 10 min walk
60
Minutes
3
Rooms
19
Players
✓
Booked
🔐
The Enigma
Secret Mission in Enemy Territory
Team 1

An elite unit on a top-secret mission to steal the infamous Enigma cipher machine codebook and change the course of the war. Discovered behind enemy lines and captured, tied up and under heavy guard — you must find a way to free yourselves and complete the mission before the airstrike reduces the base to rubble.

⚔️ WWII / AdventureDifficulty 3.5 / 5Age 14+English available
Team 1
Rob
Mark
Nick
Paul
Mason
James
🏴‍☠️
The Sunken Pirate Treasure
Dive before the oxygen runs out
Team 2 · The Stag's Room

Captain Jack Rackham's cursed treasure lies at the bottom of the sea. With a small submarine you dive down to explore the wreck — the pirate's spirit still haunts it. One hour before the oxygen runs out and the sea swallows you forever. The pressure is, quite literally, on.

🌊 Underwater / PirateDifficulty 3 / 5Intense atmosphereEnglish available
Team 2
Puddy 👑
Jack B
Martin
Josh B
Ben
Rick
📺
Chaos in Schlotterfeld
Save the cartoon world before it disappears into the toaster
Team 3

You fall asleep and wake up in a cartoon world — yellow, shrill, and somehow weird. The appliances are going crazy, the fridge speaks in riddles, the vacuum cleaner wants to be mayor. The chaotic Schlempson family has no idea what's happening. The reactor is boiling over. Find the clues, stop the madness, and save Schlotterfeld before the whole place disappears into the toaster.

📺 Cartoon / ComedyDifficulty 3 / 5Beginner-friendlyEnglish available
Team 3
Josh Mc
Simon
Will
Russell
Luke M
Andy
Jack F
Arrive 10–15 minutes early for your briefing. Each room has a game master on camera — they'll give hints if asked, but obviously none of you will need them. Puddy is in the room with a 60-minute oxygen countdown. No pressure, lads.
